title: MCP Plugin-Delivery Contract
description: SSOT JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Molecule concierge management-MCP plugin-delivery contract. Relocated from molecule-core (contracts/mcp-plugin-delivery.contract.json) per RFC molecule-core#3285 (Tool-Contract SSOT & Codegen Architecture). This schema describes the shape of the canonical contract instance (mcp-plugin-delivery.contract.json), which records how the management-mode MCP server descriptor (`mcp_server_name`) is delivered into each runtime's native settings, and the SINGULAR `required_tool` verb the concierge degrade gate enforces. INVARIANT: `required_tool` MUST remain exactly `provision_workspace` and MUST NEVER be renamed (e.g. to `create_workspace`) — renaming verbs is the #3082 phantom-verb regression class explicitly flagged by RFC §15. The Go degrade gate (`platform_agent.go`, `conciergePlatformMCPRequiredTool`, test `TestSSOT_DegradeGateToolDerivesFromContract`) derives its required tool from this contract.

settings_path.description: Default (claude_code) settings file path the rendered MCP descriptor is written to, e.g. /configs/.claude/settings.json. Per-runtime paths live under `runtimes`.

key.description: Top-level key inside the settings file under which MCP servers are declared (e.g. mcpServers).

entry_shape.description: Human-readable shorthand for the descriptor entry shape, e.g. name->{command,args?,env?}.

mcp_server_name.description: Logical name of the management-mode MCP server descriptor (e.g. molecule-platform).

required_tool.description: INVARIANT — the singular tool verb the concierge management MCP must expose; the degrade gate fails closed if it is absent on the live surface. Pinned via `const` to `provision_workspace`; MUST NEVER be renamed (the #3082 phantom-verb regression class). The Go side derives the degrade-gate required tool from this field.

loaded_mcp_tools_field.description: Name of the field reporting the set of tools actually loaded from the MCP server (e.g. loaded_mcp_tools).

legacy_binary_path.description: Filesystem path of the legacy MCP server binary that older presence probes checked (e.g. /opt/molecule-mcp-server).

runtime_present_field.description: Name of the runtime-reported boolean field indicating the MCP server is present (e.g. mcp_server_present).

producer.description: Identifier of the producer/adapter that emits the descriptor (e.g. MCPServerAdaptor).

consumer.description: Primary consumer that reads the rendered descriptor (e.g. claude_sdk_executor._load_settings_mcp).

consumers.description: Full list of consumers that read/derive from this contract or the rendered descriptor.

descriptor.description: Prose description of the runtime-agnostic descriptor and the MCP-wiring PORT that renders it into native runtime config.

port.description: The MCP-wiring PORT: the hook/implementation/probe/dispatch surface that renders the descriptor into the active runtime's native config.

hook.description: Hook entry point that registers the MCP server (e.g. InstallContext.register_mcp_server).

impl.description: Default implementation of the registration hook (e.g. BaseAdapter.register_mcp_server_hook).

present_probe.description: Probe that reports whether the management MCP is present (e.g. BaseAdapter.management_mcp_present).

dispatch.description: How the default hook dispatches per runtime.

resolver_default.description: Plugin-registry resolver default that maps an mcpServers-shaped plugin to the MCP server adaptor for any runtime.

runtimes.description: Per-runtime rendering targets (settings path, format, renderer, status) for the descriptor. Keys are runtime identifiers (e.g. claude_code, codex, gemini_cli, hermes).

additionalProperties.description: Rendering target for a single runtime.

settings_path.description: Path of the runtime's native settings/config file (may be `unverified` for not-yet-verified runtimes).

format.description: Serialization format of the settings file, e.g. json or toml (may be `unverified`).

key.description: Top-level key under which MCP servers are declared, for JSON-keyed runtimes (e.g. mcpServers). Mutually-typical with `table`.

table.description: TOML table under which MCP servers are declared, for TOML-table runtimes (e.g. mcp_servers). Mutually-typical with `key`.

renderer.description: Renderer function that emits this runtime's native config (e.g. mcp_render.render_claude_settings).

status.description: Implementation status of this runtime's renderer (e.g. implemented, todo-unverified).
